items.html: Know that before the emanated beings were emanated and the created beings created 1, an upper, simple light 2 had filled all of reality 3. There was no vacant place 4, such as empty air 5 and space 6, but everything was filled with that simple light of Ein Sof [infinity] 7. It did not have a quality of Rosh, or Sof 8, but rather everything was one, simple light 9, completely even 10, and it is called the “light of Ein Sof 20.”

When it arose in His simple will 30 to create the worlds and emanate the emanated beings to bring the perfection of His deeds, His names, and appellations to light, which was the reason for the creation of the worlds.
Then Ein Sof restricted Himself 40 in the middle point in Him 50, in the very middle, restricted that light, and moved away 60 to the sides around the middle point 70.

Then there remained a vacant place 80, air, and an empty space, from the very middle point. And that restriction was even around that middle, empty point 90, in a way that the place of that space was round on all its sides, completely even 100. It was not in a shape of a square, with a perpendicular angle, for Ein Sof, too, had restricted Himself like a circle, even on all sides.

The reason was that since the light of Ein Sof was completely even, it had to restrict itself evenly on all sides, and not restrict itself on one side more than on the others. It is known in the wisdom of geometry that there is none so even an image as the image of the circle 200. However, this is not the case with the image of the square 300, with the bulging perpendicular angle, the image of the triangle 400, and likewise all the other images. For this reason, the restriction of Ein Sof had to be in the form of a circle.
